text:
Market today: Tech is getting hammered, especially chips, which is hitting your concentrated book hard. The driver is broad economic worries and sector-specific weakness.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.7%), SMH (-12.55%), SOXL (-46.9%), QQQI (-3.9%), and SPAL (-47.93%) are all marked SELL. Your leveraged bets, SOXL and SPAL, are deep underwater and decay is a major concern. CRWD (12.9%) and SPY (1.19%) are holding up.

Watch: Chip stocks are in bear territory, but a BofA analyst suggests not panicking. Keep an eye on how this sector sentiment evolves.

Bottom line: Your leveraged tech and chip positions are bleeding, and margin amplifies the pain. Focus on managing these riskier bets.
plays: Consider trimming SOXL and SPAL further, especially if they show signs of continued decay or breach key levels.
Re-evaluate your QQQ and SMH SELL signals; the sector weakness is significant.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
